vulnerabilities.description: Unsanitized user input in login form allows SQL injection attacks
vulnerabilities.impact: Potential full database compromise and unauthorized access
vulnerabilities.recommendation: Use parameterized queries and input validation

vulnerabilities.description: User input in search field not properly sanitized
vulnerabilities.impact: Session hijacking and malicious script execution
vulnerabilities.recommendation: Implement output encoding and Content Security Policy

vulnerabilities.impact: Increased risk of clickjacking and MIME sniffing
vulnerabilities.recommendation: Add security headers to server configuration

vulnerabilities.description: Server version disclosed in HTTP headers
vulnerabilities.impact: Reveals system information to potential attackers
vulnerabilities.recommendation: Remove or obscure server version information
